item.title: CryptDB
item.description: Problem Description The paper considers the situation where users make a query to database on an online application. Different with former papers (meaning that according to the paper read formerly), we think that the data stored in database belong to users and want to avoid the database from learning any knowledge of these data. Then, the proposed schema is having the database store encrypted data. However, the paper consider an adversary outside that wants to thieve the data in database.
